---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<video autoplay muted loop playsinline 
         style="width: 100%; max-width: 1000px; height: auto; display: block; border: none;">
```

<source src="skills.mp4" type="video/mp4">

</video>

## Technical Skills

My work combines **epidemiology, data science, and public health research** with a strong emphasis on **applied analytics, reproducibility, and communication**.

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --card-bg: #BFdFF3;
  --card-border: #CCD537;
  --card-accent: #F055A5;
  --card-text: #7A88FE;
  --card-muted: #FF9B28;
  --card-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  --card-shadow-hover: 0 18px 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10);
}

.skills-section {
  margin-top: 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.skills-section h2 {
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.skills-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.skill-card {
  position: relative;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, var(--card-bg) 100%);
  border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--card-accent);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 20px 20px 18px 20px;
  box-shadow: var(--card-shadow);
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.skill-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  box-shadow: var(--card-shadow-hover);
  border-color: #FF9B28;
}

.skill-card::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(125, 143, 139, 0.10), transparent 42%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.skill-card h3 {
  position: relative;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  color: var(--card-text);
  z-index: 1;
}

.skill-card p {
  position: relative;
  margin: 0.35rem 0;
  color: var(--card-text);
  z-index: 1;
}

.skill-note {
  position: relative;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--card-muted);
  font-style: italic;
  z-index: 1;
}

.section-label {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F055A5;
}

.award-card {
  border-left-color: #FABE37;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .skill-card {
    padding: 18px;
  }
}
</style>
```

::::::::::::::::::: skills-section
::: section-label
Programming & Tools
:::

::::::: skills-grid
::: skill-card
<h3>Languages</h3>

<p>R</p>

<p>SQL</p>

<p>SAS</p>

<p>Python</p>

<p>SPSS</p>

<p>STATA</p>

<p class="skill-note">

R & SAS primary; Python actively developing

</p>
:::

::: skill-card
<h3>Reproducibility & Reporting</h3>

<p>Quarto</p>

<p>Git / GitHub</p>

<p>R Shiny</p>

<p>R Markdown</p>
:::

::: skill-card
<h3>Data & Databases</h3>

<p>EHR (Epic, Cerner)</p>

<p>BRFSS / NHANES / SEER</p>

<p>REDCap</p>

<p>Clinical datasets</p>

<p>CDC surveillance data</p>
:::

::: skill-card
<h3>Analytics & ML</h3>

<p>Regression modeling</p>

<p>Survey-weighted analysis</p>

<p>Machine learning</p>

<p>NLP / LLMs</p>

<p>Causal inference</p>

<p>Data visualization</p>
:::
:::::::

::: section-label
Domain Expertise
:::

::::: skills-grid
::: skill-card
<h3>Public Health & Epidemiology</h3>

<p>Epidemiologic study design</p>

<p>Real-world evidence (RWE)</p>

<p>Health disparities</p>

<p>Cancer epidemiology</p>

<p>Observational studies</p>
:::

::: skill-card
<h3>Clinical & Industry-Facing</h3>

<p>Real-world data (RWD)</p>

<p>Clinical trial design</p>

<p>Diversity & inclusion in research</p>

<p>IRB & regulatory compliance</p>

<p>Stakeholder communication</p>
:::
:::::

::: section-label
Languages
:::

:::: skills-grid
::: skill-card
<h3>Spoken Languages</h3>

<p>Spanish — native</p>

<p>English — fluent</p>
:::
::::

::: section-label
Selected Awards & Recognition
:::

:::: skills-grid
::: {.skill-card .award-card}
<h3>Awards</h3>

<p>AUC Data Science Initiative — Curriculum Development Award (2024)</p>

<p>FIU Three Minute Thesis — Top 10 Finalist (2023)</p>

<p>FIU Outstanding Graduate Teaching Assistant Nominee (2023)</p>

<p>C.V. Starr Scholarship — Florida International University</p>
:::
::::
:::::::::::::::::::

## Strengths I Bring

Beyond technical tools, I bring a strong ability to connect analytic work with meaningful public health questions. I enjoy translating complex data into clear insights, collaborating across disciplines, and designing work that is rigorous, reproducible, and useful in practice.
